Sarasota County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Sarasota County, Florida

FHA loans across Sarasota County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, where FHA fits from the coast to North Port, and how to get pre-approved.

Sarasota County Home Loans

FHA loans in Sarasota County, Florida

Sarasota County blends the arts-and-beaches glamour of the city of Sarasota with rapidly growing, affordable communities inland like North Port. That range shapes FHA here: coastal and barrier-island properties often exceed FHA limits, but the inland market is one of Southwest Florida's best FHA values, with new construction and prices well within reach.

Sarasota County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Sarasota County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Sarasota County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). That covers most inland Sarasota County homes; coastal and barrier-island properties often exceed it. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Sarasota County's exact figure with HUD.

Coastal Sarasota vs. inland value

The sweet spot for FHA buyers is inland — North Port and similar communities offer new and existing homes within the loan limit, great for first-time buyers. Closer to the coast, prices climb and condos dominate; for condos, confirm FHA approval via our condo guide. We'll help you target the Sarasota County homes that fit your FHA budget and get you pre-approved first.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Sarasota County

We help FHA buyers throughout Sarasota County, including Sarasota, Venice, North Port, and Englewood. For a closer look at the local market, loan limits, and down payment help, explore our city guide(s):

Sarasota

Down payment help in Sarasota County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Sarasota County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Sarasota County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Sarasota County for 2026?+
Sarasota County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers most inland homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Where does FHA work best in Sarasota County?+
Inland communities like North Port offer the best FHA value, with new construction and prices within the loan limit.
Can I use FHA on the Sarasota coast?+
Coastal and barrier-island properties often exceed FHA limits, but FHA works well inland and on many FHA-approved condos.
How much down payment do I need in Sarasota County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Sarasota County?+
Yes — Sarasota, Venice, North Port, Englewood, and every community in the county.
